selected_pages.reason: Directly covers reading CSV as Java Beans objects using ObjectMapperFactory/ObjectMapper with @Csv/@CsvFormat annotations — the core feature the question asks about.
Provides a concrete end-to-end example of reading a CSV file line-by-line in a Nablarch batch context using DataReader and BatchAction.
Covers which DataReaders and action classes to use (and which to avoid) when using データバインド in a Nablarch batch.
Covers file I/O details for Nablarch batch including standard DataReaders for file reading.
Covers FILE to DB batch pattern which is the canonical pattern when reading CSV files in Nablarch batch.

excluded_pages.reason: 汎用データフォーマット is an alternative to データバインド; since the question specifically asks for Java Beans binding, this secondary approach was deprioritized.
Different processing type (Jakartaバッチ, not Nablarchバッチ) — skip per processing type constraint.
Different processing type (ウェブアプリケーション) — skip per processing type constraint.
Different processing type (RESTfulウェブサービス) — skip per processing type constraint.

selected_sections.reason: Directly shows how to read a file one item at a time as Java Beans using ObjectMapperFactory#create and ObjectMapper#read().
Explains how to specify CSV format on the Java Beans class using @Csv and @CsvFormat annotations.
Shows the complete DataReader implementation using ObjectMapperIterator to supply one CSV row at a time to the batch action.
Shows BatchAction implementation with createReader method returning the custom DataReader.
Critical constraint: standard FileDataReader uses 汎用データフォーマット, so it must NOT be used with データバインド.
Critical constraint: standard FileBatchAction uses 汎用データフォーマット, so BatchAction must be used instead when using データバインド.
Specifies that all properties must be String type for externally received file data — important constraint.
Lists available CSV format sets (DEFAULT, RFC4180, EXCEL, TSV) for @Csv type attribute selection.
Explains the batch processing flow showing how DataReader feeds one record at a time to the action handler.

excluded_sections.reason: General overview section with no specific implementation details.
Covers Map object binding, not Java Beans binding — not relevant.
Covers writing Java Beans to file — out of scope for this read-focused question.
Fixed-length file format — not relevant to CSV question.
Overview section only — no concrete implementation details.
Explains -requestPath startup parameter — not directly relevant to CSV reading.
FILE to DB pattern description provides context but does not add implementation details beyond what getting-started sections provide.

used.reason: Provided the core ObjectMapperFactory/ObjectMapper read pattern and code example.
Provided the constraint that all Java Beans properties must be String type for externally received files.
Provided the complete DataReader/ObjectMapperIterator implementation example.
Provided the BatchAction implementation with createReader method.
Provided the critical constraint that standard FileDataReader must not be used with データバインド.
Provided the critical constraint that FileBatchAction must not be used with データバインド.
